news.t: UPDATE -- Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Tidal Financial Group and Defiance ETFs Announce Reverse Stock Splits for Select ETFs
Defiance Launches QSU: The First 2X Long ETF for QuantumScape Corporation

holdings.infoBox: QSU is an equity ETF with a total of 12 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Long QS ETF (QSU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of QuantumScape Corp. (ticker: QS), net fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements. QSU was launched on Oct 20, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.
